# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="{{ str_replace('_', '-', app()->getLocale()) }}">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Comments</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        <h1>Blog Comments</h1>
        @foreach($comments as $comment)
            <div class="card mb-2">
                <div class="card-header">{{ $comment->user->name }} commented on {{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    <p>{!! $comment->content !!}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        @endforeach
    </div>
</body>
</html>
